columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the log entry was generated.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: The type of event, used to filter logs (e.g., LoginEvent, UriEvent).

columns.name: EventDate
columns.description: The time when the specified event was captured.

columns.name: EventIdentifier
columns.description: The unique ID of the event.

columns.name: UserId
columns.description: The origin user's unique ID.

columns.name: LoginKey
columns.description: The string that ties together all events in a given user's login session.

columns.name: SessionKey
columns.description: The user's unique session ID. Use this value to identify all user events within a session.

columns.name: SourceIp
columns.description: The source IP address of the client.

columns.name: EvaluationTime
columns.description: The amount of time it took to evaluate the policy in milliseconds.

columns.name: PolicyId
columns.description: The ID of the transaction policy associated with this event.

columns.name: PolicyOutcome
columns.description: The result of the transaction policy.

columns.name: SessionLevel
columns.description: Session-level security that controls user access to features such as connected apps and reporting.

columns.name: RelatedEventIdentifier
columns.description: The EventIdentifier of the related event for multi-factor authentication flows.

columns.name: LoginHistoryId
columns.description: Tracks a user session so you can correlate user activity with a particular login instance.

columns.name: CreatedDate
columns.description: The date and time when the event record was created in Salesforce.

columns.name: EventUuid
columns.description: The universally unique identifier (UUID) of the event.

columns.name: ReplayId
columns.description: The replay ID used to resume event streaming from a specific point in the event stream.

columns.name: CreatedById
columns.description: The ID of the user who created the event record.

columns.name: LastReferencedDate
columns.description: The timestamp for when the current user last viewed a record related to this record.

columns.name: LastViewedDate
columns.description: The timestamp for when the current user last viewed this record.

columns.name: QueriedEntities
columns.description: The type of entities associated with the event.

columns.name: Score
columns.description: A number representing the anomaly score for the activity tracked by this event.

columns.name: Summary
columns.description: A text summary of the threat that caused this event to be created.

columns.name: Operation
columns.description: The operation being performed on the entity (e.g., Read, Create, Update, Delete).

columns.name: SecurityEventData
columns.description: The set of browser fingerprint features about the anomaly that triggered this event, in JSON format.

columns.name: RowsProcessed
columns.description: Total row count for the current operation.

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: The user agent used in the HTTP request.

columns.name: UserType
columns.description: The category of user license (e.g., Standard, Guest, CspLitePortal).

columns.name: Application
columns.description: The application used to access the org.

columns.name: LoginType
columns.description: The type of login used to access the session.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The display name of the entity.

columns.name: Platform
columns.description: The operating system name and version used during the event.

columns.name: Records
columns.description: A JSON string that represents the queried data records.

columns.name: ActionName
columns.description: The name of the action.

columns.name: AdditionalInfo
columns.description: JSON serialization of additional information captured from the HTTP headers.

columns.name: AnomalySubType
columns.description: The sub-type of the anomaly event, indicating the specific anomaly category detected.

columns.name: ApiType
columns.description: The type of API used (e.g., SOAP Enterprise, SOAP Partner, REST, Bulk).

columns.name: AppName
columns.description: The name of the application that the user accessed.

columns.name: BotId
columns.description: The ID of the bot.

columns.name: BotSessionIdentifier
columns.description: The bot session ID.

columns.name: Browser
columns.description: The browser name and version if known (e.g., Chrome 77, Firefox, Safari).

columns.name: City
columns.description: The city where the user's IP address is physically located.

columns.name: ColumnHeaders
columns.description: Comma-separated values of column headers (API names, not UI labels).

columns.name: Country
columns.description: The country where the user's IP address is physically located.

columns.name: CountryIso
columns.description: The ISO 3166 code for the country where the user's IP address is physically located.

columns.name: EventSource
columns.description: The source of the event (e.g., API, Classic, Lightning).

columns.name: ExecutionIdentifier
columns.description: Unique identifier to correlate multiple data chunks from a single execution.

columns.name: LoginUrl
columns.description: The URL of the login page.

columns.name: NumberOfColumns
columns.description: The number of columns in the list view or report.

columns.name: OwnerId
columns.description: The ID of the org or user who owns the record.

columns.name: PlannerId
columns.description: The ID of the agent planner.

columns.name: PostalCode
columns.description: The postal code where the user's IP address is physically located.

columns.name: Query
columns.description: The SOQL query.

columns.name: RecordId
columns.description: The ID of the record being viewed or edited.

columns.name: RequestIdentifier
columns.description: The unique ID of a single transaction.

columns.name: Scope
columns.description: Defines the scope of the data (e.g., user, team, organization).

columns.name: Sequence
columns.description: Incremental sequence number that indicates the order of multiple correlated events.

columns.name: Subdivision
columns.description: The name of the subdivision where the user's IP address is physically located (e.g., state).

columns.name: AcceptLanguage
columns.description: List of HTTP Headers that specify the natural language the client understands.

columns.name: Activity
columns.description: The action the user attempted that requires identity verification.

columns.name: ApiAnomalyEventNumber
columns.description: The unique number automatically assigned to the API anomaly event.

columns.name: ApiVersionNumber
columns.description: The numeric version of the API.

columns.name: ApiVersion
columns.description: The API version string. If no version number is available, Unknown is returned.

columns.name: AppId
columns.description: The ID of the app provider seeking authentication.

columns.name: AuthMethodReference
columns.description: The authentication method used by a third-party identification provider for OpenID Connect SSO.

columns.name: AuthServiceId
columns.description: The 18-character ID for an authentication service for a login event.

columns.name: AuthSessionId
columns.description: The ID of the authentication session.

columns.name: CanDownloadPdf
columns.description: Indicates whether the downloaded PDF was converted from another file type.

columns.name: CipherSuite
columns.description: The TLS cipher suite used for the login.

columns.name: Client
columns.description: The service that executed the API event.

columns.name: ClientVersion
columns.description: The version number of the login client.

columns.name: ConnectedAppId
columns.description: The 15-character ID of the connected app associated with the API call.

columns.name: ConnectionType
columns.description: The type of connection (e.g., CDMA, WIFI, LTE).

columns.name: ContentSize
columns.description: The size of the document in bytes.

columns.name: CredentialStuffingEventNumber
columns.description: The unique number automatically assigned to the credential stuffing event.

columns.name: CurrentIp
columns.description: The IP address of the newly observed fingerprint that deviates from the previous one.

columns.name: CurrentPlatform
columns.description: The platform of the newly observed fingerprint that deviates from the previous one.

columns.name: CurrentScreen
columns.description: The screen of the newly observed fingerprint that deviates from the previous one.

columns.name: CurrentUserAgent
columns.description: The user agent of the newly observed fingerprint that deviates from the previous one.

columns.name: CurrentWindow
columns.description: The browser window of the newly observed fingerprint that deviates from the previous one.

columns.name: DashboardId
columns.description: The ID of the dashboard that the report was part of.

columns.name: DashboardName
columns.description: The title of the dashboard that the report was part of.

columns.name: DelegatedOrganizationId
columns.description: Organization ID of the admin who logs in as another user.

columns.name: DelegatedUsername
columns.description: Username of the admin who logs in as another user.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: The description of the report.

columns.name: DeveloperName
columns.description: The unique name of the object in the API.

columns.name: DeviceId
columns.description: The unique identifier used to identify a device when tracking events.

columns.name: DeviceModel
columns.description: The name of the device model.

columns.name: DevicePlatform
columns.description: The type of application experience in name:experience:form format.

columns.name: DeviceSessionId
columns.description: The unique identifier of the user's session based on page load time.

columns.name: DisplayedFieldEntities
columns.description: The API values of the fields displayed on the report, including grouped column entity names.

columns.name: DocumentId
columns.description: The 18-character ID of the document being downloaded.

columns.name: Duration
columns.description: The duration in milliseconds since the page start time.

columns.name: EffectivePageTime
columns.description: The time in milliseconds for the page to load before a user could interact with it.

columns.name: EffectivePageTimeDeviationErrorType
columns.description: Indicates the origin of an error when the page has a loading deviation.

columns.name: EffectivePageTimeDeviationReason
columns.description: The reason for deviation in page loading time.

columns.name: ElapsedTime
columns.description: The amount of time it took for the request to complete in milliseconds.

columns.name: ErrorCode
columns.description: The error code for the authentication issue.

columns.name: EventGroup
columns.description: ID of the verification attempt; multiple attempts in a session share the same ID.

columns.name: EventSourceDetail
columns.description: The source of the event providing additional detail beyond EventSource.

columns.name: ExportFileFormat
columns.description: The format of the exported report (e.g., CSV, Excel).

columns.name: FeatureContribution
columns.description: A percentage representing how much the feature contributed to the anomaly score.

columns.name: FeatureName
columns.description: The name of the feature that contributed to the anomaly score.

columns.name: FeatureValue
columns.description: The value of the feature that contributed to the anomaly score.

columns.name: FileAction
columns.description: The action taken on the file (e.g., API_DOWNLOAD, PREVIEW, UI_DOWNLOAD, UPLOAD).

columns.name: FileName
columns.description: The name of the file including the file extension.

columns.name: FileSource
columns.description: Origin of the document (S=Salesforce, E=External, L=Social Customer Service).

columns.name: FileType
columns.description: The content type of the file.

columns.name: FilterCriteria
columns.description: A JSON string that represents the filter criteria at the time the event was captured.

columns.name: Format
columns.description: The format of the report (e.g., Matrix, MultiBlock, Summary, Tabular).

columns.name: ForwardedForIp
columns.description: The value in the X-Forwarded-For header of HTTP requests sent by the client.

columns.name: GroupedColumnHeaders
columns.description: Comma-separated values of grouped column fields in summary, matrix, and joined reports.

columns.name: GuestUserAnomalyEventNumber
columns.description: The unique number automatically assigned to the guest user anomaly event.

columns.name: HasEffectivePageTimeDeviation
columns.description: Indicates when a deviation is detected in effective page time.

columns.name: HasExternalUsers
columns.description: Indicates whether external users are impacted by the operation that triggered a permission change.

columns.name: HasLogoutUrl
columns.description: Indicates whether a logout URL has been assigned to the app.

columns.name: HttpMethod
columns.description: The HTTP method of the login request (e.g., GET, POST).

columns.name: HttpReferer
columns.description: The referring URI of the page receiving the request.

columns.name: SalesforceObjectId
columns.description: The Salesforce record ID of the event store object.

columns.name: IdentityUsed
columns.description: The identity (username) of the user being authenticated.

columns.name: ImpactedUserIds
columns.description: A list of IDs of the users affected by the event. Maximum of 1,000 user IDs.

columns.name: InitiatedBy
columns.description: The code describing how the authentication request was initiated (e.g., IdP, SP, OauthAuthorize).

columns.name: IsLatestVersion
columns.description: Indicates whether the file is the most current version.

columns.name: IsScheduled
columns.description: Indicates whether the report was scheduled.

columns.name: Latitude
columns.description: The latitude where the user's IP address is physically located.

columns.name: ListViewId
columns.description: The ID of the list view associated with this event.

columns.name: LoginAnomalyEventNumber
columns.description: The unique number automatically assigned to the login anomaly event.

columns.name: LoginAsCategory
columns.description: Represents how the user logs in as another user (e.g., OrgAdmin, Community).

columns.name: LoginAccessChangeExpDate
columns.description: The expiration date of the login access change granted to another user.

columns.name: LoginAccessChangeGranteeName
columns.description: The name of the user or entity granted login access.

columns.name: LoginAccessChangeGranteeType
columns.description: The type of the grantee for login access (e.g., Admin, Support).

columns.name: LoginGeoId
columns.description: The Salesforce ID of the LoginGeo object associated with the login user's IP address.

columns.name: LoginLatitude
columns.description: The latitude where the user's IP address is physically located during login.

columns.name: LoginLongitude
columns.description: The longitude where the user's IP address is physically located during login.

columns.name: LoginSubType
columns.description: The type of login flow used.

columns.name: Longitude
columns.description: The longitude where the user's IP address is physically located.

columns.name: Message
columns.description: The failure message if the operation failed.

columns.name: NetworkId
columns.description: The ID of the Experience Cloud site that the user is logging in to.

columns.name: OperationDetail
columns.description: The type of operation that triggers a permission change.

columns.name: OperationStatus
columns.description: Whether the operation performed on the entity succeeded or failed.

columns.name: OrderBy
columns.description: The column that the list view is sorted by.

columns.name: OsName
columns.description: The operating system name.

columns.name: OsVersion
columns.description: The operating system version.

columns.name: PageStartTime
columns.description: The time when the page was initially loaded.

columns.name: PageUrl
columns.description: Relative URL of the top-level Lightning Experience or Salesforce mobile app page.

columns.name: ParentIdList
columns.description: The IDs of the affected permission sets or permission set groups.

columns.name: ParentNameList
columns.description: The names of the affected permission sets or permission set groups.

columns.name: PermissionExpiration
columns.description: The timestamp when the permission change expires.

columns.name: PermissionExpirationList
columns.description: Timestamps specifying when added permissions will be revoked.

columns.name: PermissionList
columns.description: The list of permissions that are enabled or disabled in the event.

columns.name: PermissionType
columns.description: The type of permission updated in the event (e.g., ObjectPermission, UserPermission).

columns.name: Policy
columns.description: The identity verification security policy or setting.

columns.name: PreviousIp
columns.description: The IP address of the previous fingerprint before the deviation was detected.

columns.name: PreviousPageAppName
columns.description: The internal name of the previous application accessed from the App Launcher.

columns.name: PreviousPageEntityId
columns.description: The unique previous page entity identifier.

columns.name: PreviousPageEntityType
columns.description: The previous page entity type.

columns.name: PreviousPageUrl
columns.description: The relative URL of the previous Lightning Experience or Salesforce mobile app page.

columns.name: PreviousPlatform
columns.description: The platform of the previous fingerprint before the deviation was detected.

columns.name: PreviousScreen
columns.description: The screen of the previous fingerprint before the deviation was detected.

columns.name: PreviousUserAgent
columns.description: The user agent of the previous fingerprint before the deviation was detected.

columns.name: PreviousWindow
columns.description: The browser window of the previous fingerprint before the deviation was detected.

columns.name: ProcessDuration
columns.description: The amount of time to download the file in milliseconds.

columns.name: Remarks
columns.description: The text users see when prompted to verify their identity.

columns.name: RemoteIdentifier
columns.description: Reserved for future use.

columns.name: Report
columns.description: The report ID for which this anomaly event was detected.

columns.name: ReportAnomalyEventNumber
columns.description: The unique number automatically assigned to the report anomaly event.

columns.name: ReportId
columns.description: The ID of the report associated with this event.

columns.name: RequestedEntities
columns.description: Objects queried by the guest user.

columns.name: SalesforceResourceId
columns.description: The ID of the connected app resource.

columns.name: RowsReturned
columns.description: The number of rows of data returned in the current batch.

columns.name: SamlEntityUrl
columns.description: The authentication URL of the SAML provider.

columns.name: SdkAppType
columns.description: The mobile SDK application type (e.g., NATIVE, HYBRID, REACTNATIVE).

columns.name: SdkAppVersion
columns.description: The version of the mobile SDK the application uses.

columns.name: SdkVersion
columns.description: The mobile SDK application version number.

columns.name: SessionHijackingEventNumber
columns.description: The unique number automatically assigned to the session hijacking event.

columns.name: SoqlCommands
columns.description: SOQL commands run by the guest user.

columns.name: SsoType
columns.description: The type of SSO (e.g., Oidc, Saml).

columns.name: Status
columns.description: The status of the login attempt or operation.

columns.name: StatusDetail
columns.description: Additional status detail for the event.

columns.name: TargetUrl
columns.description: The URL redirected to after logging in as another user.

columns.name: TlsProtocol
columns.description: The TLS protocol version used for the login (e.g., TLS 1.2, TLS 1.3).

columns.name: TotalControllerEvents
columns.description: The number of times controllers were triggered.

columns.name: Uri
columns.description: The URI of the page receiving the request.

columns.name: UseApiToken
columns.description: Indicates login with API Token - T token, or P password.

columns.name: UserAgentDetail
columns.description: The type of client used to make the request as a string.

columns.name: UserCount
columns.description: The number of users affected by the event. Maximum value of 1,000.

columns.name: UserNameDetail
columns.description: The username in user@company.com format at the time the event was created.

columns.name: UserTypeDetail
columns.description: The category of user license for the user involved in the event.

columns.name: VerificationMethod
columns.description: The method by which the user attempted to verify identity (e.g., Email, Sms, U2F, Totp).

columns.name: VersionId
columns.description: The specific version of a document in Salesforce CRM Content or Files.

columns.name: VersionNumber
columns.description: The version number of the file.
